title: JobBERT-v2 Embeddings & Matching
description: Serverless endpoint wrapping TechWolf/JobBERT-v2 — a sentence-transformers model fine-tuned for job-title matching. Supports `embed` (return 1024-dim vectors for a list of titles) and `match` (rank candidates against a query by cosine similarity).

input.name: Hugging Face model
input.description: Sentence-Transformers model id to load. Defaults to TechWolf/JobBERT-v2. Note: the default model is baked into the image; switching here will pay a one-time download on cold start.
